title: Plugin Manager for SystemLink Submission Manifest
description: Schema for manifest.json files in submissions/ directories. Used by CI to validate app submissions.

package.description: Unique package identifier (lowercase, hyphens/dots/underscores allowed). First-come-first-served.

version.description: Semantic version (MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH). No pre-release or build metadata.

displayName.description: Human-readable app name shown in the store UI.

section.description: Fine-grained category shown in the Plugin Manager catalog, such as Dashboard, Data Analysis, Integration, or Monitoring.

maintainer.description: Maintainer name and email, e.g. 'Acme Corp <apps@acme.com>'. This is also used for the author display in the Plugin Manager UI.

homepage.description: Link to project homepage, documentation, or source repository.

license.description: SPDX license identifier (e.g. MIT, Apache-2.0) or 'Proprietary'.

xbPlugin.description: Top-level plugin type used for Plugin Manager routing and filtering. This value is written to the XB-Plugin feed attribute.

slPluginManagerMinServerVersion.description: Minimum SystemLink server version, e.g. '2024 Q4'.

nipkgFile.description: Filename of the .nipkg in this submission directory.
